---
title: "API Deployment and Testing: NHANES Prediabetes Model"
author: "Zhalae Daneshvari, Jolene Ie, Nick Johnson"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# API Deployment
```{python}

# # --- Auth & board setup ---
# import os, gcsfs, pins
# SA_KEY = "/home/ji92/proj-01-dank-corgi/service-auth.json"
# os.environ["GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS"] = SA_KEY
# gcsfs.GCSFileSystem.clear_instance_cache()

# board = pins.board_gcs(path="info-4940-models/ji92/", allow_pickle_read=True)

# # --- Data ---
# import pandas as pd
# CSV_PATH = "data-raw/nhanes2123_surveyonly_clean.csv"
# df = pd.read_csv(CSV_PATH)
# target_col = "prediabetes_flag"

# X = df.drop(columns=[target_col])
# y = df[target_col]

# # --- Preprocessing pipeline (same as notebook) ---
# from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
# from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder, FunctionTransformer
# from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
# from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
# from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegressionCV
# from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold

# RANDOM_STATE = 42
# present_numeric = [
#     "age_years", "bmi_from_selfreport", "weight_change_1y_lb",
#     "sleep_hours_weekdays", "sedentary_minutes", "drinks_per_day_12mo",
# ]
# present_categorical = [
#     "sex","race_eth","ever_smoker","current_smoker","ever_high_bp_ans",
#     "ever_high_chol_ans","smoked_100_cigs_ans","smoke_now_ans",
#     "tried_lose_weight_past_year_ans","regular_periods_12mo_ans",
#     "dpq_poor_appetite_ans","ever_asthma_ans","anemia_treatment_3mo_ans",
#     "ever_chf_ans","ever_heart_attack_ans","ever_stroke_ans",
#     "ever_thyroid_problem_ans","ever_liver_condition_ans",
# ]
# def to_str_func(X):
#     return X.astype(str)

# num_pipe = Pipeline([
#     ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="median", add_indicator=True)),
#     ("sc", StandardScaler()),
# ])
# cat_pipe = Pipeline([
#     ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="constant", fill_value="Unknown")),
#     ("to_str", FunctionTransformer(to_str_func)),
#     ("ohe", OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown="ignore", sparse_output=False, min_frequency=0.02)),
# ])
# preprocess = ColumnTransformer([
#     ("num", num_pipe, present_numeric),
#     ("cat", cat_pipe, present_categorical),
# ])

# # --- Model: L2 (ridge) Logistic Regression with CV ---
# cv = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=RANDOM_STATE)
# model = Pipeline([
#     ("prep", preprocess),
#     ("clf", LogisticRegressionCV(
#         Cs=[0.1, 1, 10],
#         cv=cv,
#         penalty="l2",
#         solver="lbfgs",
#         max_iter=3000,
#         scoring="roc_auc",
#         random_state=RANDOM_STATE,
#     )),
# ])
# model.fit(X, y)

# # --- Vetiver wrap & pin ---
# from vetiver import VetiverModel, vetiver_pin_write
# proto = X.head(2)
# v = VetiverModel(
#     model=model,
#     model_name="nhanes-prediabetes-new",
#     prototype_data=X.head(2),
#     metadata={"user": {"columns": list(X.columns)}},
# )

# vetiver_pin_write(board, v)

# print("✅ Model pinned successfully!")
# print("Current pins:", board.pin_list())
# # list versions for the new model
# board.pin_versions("nhanes-prediabetes-new")
# ```


```

# Starting From Scratch
# Importating Data
```{python}
import pandas as pd

# Path to your cleaned dataset
CSV_PATH = "data-raw/nhanes2123_surveyonly_clean.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(CSV_PATH)

target_col = "prediabetes_flag"
X = df.drop(columns=[target_col])
y = df[target_col]

print("✅ Data loaded:", X.shape)
print("Columns:", list(X.columns))

```


# training model and metrics
```{python}
from sklearn.pipeline import Pipeline
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler, OneHotEncoder, FunctionTransformer
from sklearn.compose import ColumnTransformer
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegressionCV
from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold, train_test_split
from sklearn.metrics import roc_auc_score, accuracy_score, classification_report

# --- Fix the column lists based on your df ---
numeric_cols = [
    "age_years", "sleep_hours_weekdays", "sedentary_minutes",
    "drinks_per_day_12mo", "bmi_from_selfreport", "weight_change_1y_lb"
]

categorical_cols = [
    'sex', 'race_eth', 'smoked_100_cigs_ans', 'smoke_now_ans',
    'tried_lose_weight_past_year_ans', 'regular_periods_12mo_ans',
    'dpq_poor_appetite_ans', 'dpq_feeling_down_ans', 'ever_asthma_ans',
    'anemia_treatment_3mo_ans', 'ever_chf_ans', 'ever_heart_attack_ans',
    'ever_stroke_ans', 'ever_thyroid_problem_ans', 'ever_liver_condition_ans',
    'ever_high_bp_ans', 'ever_high_chol_ans', 'ever_smoker', 'current_smoker'
]

# --- Define preprocessing ---
def to_str_func(X):
    return X.astype(str)

num_pipe = Pipeline([
    ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="median", add_indicator=True)),
    ("sc", StandardScaler())
])
cat_pipe = Pipeline([
    ("imp", SimpleImputer(strategy="constant", fill_value="Unknown")),
    ("to_str", FunctionTransformer(to_str_func, validate=False)),
    ("ohe", OneHotEncoder(handle_unknown="ignore", sparse_output=False, min_frequency=0.02))
])

preprocess = ColumnTransformer([
    ("num", num_pipe, numeric_cols),
    ("cat", cat_pipe, categorical_cols)
])

# --- Model ---
cv = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)
model = Pipeline([
    ("prep", preprocess),
    ("clf", LogisticRegressionCV(
        Cs=[0.1, 1, 10],
        cv=cv,
        penalty="l2",
        solver="lbfgs",
        max_iter=3000,
        scoring="roc_auc",
        random_state=42
    ))
])

# --- Split and train ---
X_train, X_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(
    X, y, test_size=0.2, stratify=y, random_state=42
)

model.fit(X_train, y_train)
print("✅ Model trained successfully!")

# --- Evaluate ---
# p_test = model.predict_proba(X_test)[:, 1]
# y_pred = (p_test >= 0.5).astype(int)

# print("ROC-AUC:", roc_auc_score(y_test, p_test))
# print("Accuracy:", accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred))
# print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_test, y_pred))

```

# manual predictions
```{python}
# # pick any row
# sample = X_test.iloc[[0]]

# print("Sample input:\n")
# display(sample)

# # model outputs a probability of prediabetes (class 1)
# prob = model.predict_proba(sample)[0, 1]
# pred = int(prob >= 0.5)

# print(f"Predicted probability: {prob:.3f}")
# print(f"Predicted class: {pred} (1 = prediabetic, 0 = not)")

```

# Make docker file

```{python}
import os, gcsfs, pins
SA_KEY = "/home/ji92/proj-01-dank-corgi/service-auth.json"
os.environ["GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS"] = SA_KEY
gcsfs.GCSFileSystem.clear_instance_cache()

board = pins.board_gcs("info-4940-models/ji92/", allow_pickle_read=True)

v = VetiverModel(
    model=model,
    model_name="prediabetes-model-1",   # ✅ same name you’ll use in prepare_docker
    prototype_data=X.head(2),
    description="Logistic regression model predicting prediabetes from NHANES survey data."
)

vetiver_pin_write(board, v)

```
```{python}
import vetiver
from vetiver import VetiverModel, vetiver_pin_write

vetiver.write_docker(
    app_file = "app.py",
    port = '2222'
)

vetiver.prepare_docker(
    board = board, 
    pin_name = "prediabetes-model-1",
    port = '2222'
)
```


```{python}
# --- STEP 1: Auth setup ---
import os, gcsfs, pins

# point to your service account JSON
os.environ["GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS"] = "/home/zwd3/proj-01-dank-corgi/service-auth.json"

# clear any old gcsfs sessions
gcsfs.GCSFileSystem.clear_instance_cache()

# --- STEP 2: Connect to your subfolder on the class bucket ---
board = pins.board_gcs("info-4940-models/zwd3/", allow_pickle_read=True)

# --- STEP 3: Test that authentication works ---
print("✅ Connected! Your available pins:")
print(board.pin_list())

```
